global_vibe: Warm, serene, grounded, calm, motivational. Rejects the clinical 'productivity bro' aesthetic in favor of a thoughtful, elegant life journal.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium

typography.instructions: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings elegant and tight. Use Manrope for high-legibility body text. Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. A cluttered mind needs an uncluttered UI.

grid_strategy.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8. Use 'Bento' style with varying col-spans. Summary cards: col-span-1. Main charts/features: col-span-2 row-span-2.
grid_strategy.content: Max-width containers for reading (max-w-3xl) to maintain optimal line length.

buttons.primary: bg-[#59745D] text-white hover:bg-[#4A604D] rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#59745D] text-[#59745D] hover:bg-[#59745D] hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-[#6B7270] hover:text-[#2D312E] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E8E2D2] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow p-6 md:p-8

navigation.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8E2D2] px-6 py-4

ui_components.shadcn_customizations: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for creative landing pages. For functional app areas (Forms, Tabs, Modals), heavily customize Shadcn UI components. Override default hard borders with soft `rounded-3xl` and replace 'Vercel Black' with Primary (#59745D) or Secondary text colors. Strip aggressive shadows.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translations (-translate-y-1) and shadow increases on cards. Color shifts on buttons.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (staggered for lists).
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Use smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended if marketing). For dashboards, ensure sticky headers have backdrop blur.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states use `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C27A62] focus:outline-none`.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a more delicate, elegant feel matching the serif typography.
icons_and_assets.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a kebab-case `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='log-workout-button'`).

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract warm sand and terracotta watercolor background. Use for onboarding or soft hero sections.
Minimalist 40 year life journey concept, terracotta and moss green colors. Perfect for the 40-year life roadmap cover.
Serene morning light passing through linen curtains. Great texture overlay or card background for meditation/self-love sections.

content_images.description: Two stones stacked on a beach at sunset. Use for Meditation or Self-care section.
Man meditating in tall grass by the ocean. Use for Fitness or Mindfulness header.
A plate of healthy Middle Eastern style food. Use for the Recipes/Nutrition section.
A green plate filled with falafel and vegetables. Use for healthy snacks/meals.

specific_section_rules.dashboard_roadmap: The 40-year blueprint should feel like a serene scrollable timeline, utilizing the 'Life Journey Hero' image as a header. Use muted terracotta and moss accents to indicate past/present/future milestones.
specific_section_rules.fitness_section: Avoid aggressive neon colors typical of gym apps. Use the 'Organic & Earthy' palette to frame workouts as 'joyful movement' rather than punishment.
specific_section_rules.recipes: Focus on high visual imagery with the Unsplash food photos. Use 'Bento' style cards for quick recipe stats (macros, time).
specific_section_rules.motivation_podcasts: Since YouTube embeds are required, style the iframe containers with rounded-2xl and a subtle border. Use the serif font for pulled quotes overlaid on the 'Morning Light Texture'.
specific_section_rules.meditation: Minimalist screen. Large timer. Perhaps a slow pulsating ring animation matching the breath, colored in soft moss green (#59745D).

testing_requirements: All interactive elements must use data-testid. Examples: data-testid='meditation-start-button', data-testid='recipe-card-falafel'.
